title: Number Box
description: A component that provides a numeric input field with increment and decrement controls. It supports min/max values, step size, and custom formatting options.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the ax-number-box component for numeric input

sections.title: Min/Max Values
sections.description: Set minimum and maximum values for the number box

sections.title: Step Size
sections.description: Configure the increment and decrement step size

sections.title: Formatting
sections.description: Customize number formatting with prefixes, suffixes, and decimal places

types.title: AXNumberBoxComponent
types.description: The main component for numeric input

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the number box

props.name: decimals
props.description: The number of decimal places to display

props.name: prefix
props.description: Text to display before the number

props.name: suffix
props.description: Text to display after the number

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the number box is disabled

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the number box is readonly

events.name: blur
events.description: Emitted when the number box loses focus

methods.content:
/**
 * Increments the value by the step size
 */
increment(): void

/**
 * Decrements the value by the step size
 */
decrement(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void
